title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta built Replit to democratize software creation through natural language interfaces. Replit selected Claude in early 2024 for coding and formed a research partnership with Anthropic, enabling users without coding experience to build applications.
